themes.exampleQuote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
Make sure you get the raspberry lychee macaroon, it is the best thing I've ever put in my mouth hands down.
It is gluten free made with almond flour.
Please do not miss this hidden gem in Pittsburgh — actually there are multiple locations.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers are unanimously enthusiastic about the pastry quality, with standout praise for the raspberry lychee macaron and the shop's Parisian-caliber baking, and no notable criticisms across any review.
notable_quote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
